texto: This is when I became myself. The girl before this time is a shadow, like a soul who is practicing how not to become. She is the background, the hole in the fabric from which the real shape is cut.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gabriel Weston: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “This is when I became myself. The girl before this time is a shadow, like a soul who is practicin…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, identity, past pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de past e time.
